title: Add staged_predict / staged_predict_proba / staged_decision_function to boosting estimators
description:
sklearn's GradientBoosting, HistGradientBoosting, and AdaBoost expose staged_* methods that return an iterator over predictions after each successive estimator was added (n_estimators iterations total). Used for early-stopping diagnostics and learning-curve plots.

Implementation: requires storing per-iteration model snapshots OR replaying the cumulative score build-up at predict time. The latter is cheaper memory-wise. Return Box<dyn Iterator<Item = Result<Array2<F>, FerroError>>> or Vec<Array2<F>>.

Lower priority — useful but not blocking.
